Home / Products / CPC Certified High Chair
MOQ: 80 PCS CPC ASTM F404

CPC Certified High Chair

CPC and ASTM F404 certified baby high chair with 7-position height adjustment and 3-position recline. Removable dishwasher-safe tray. Premium PP+metal construction. For babies 6-36 months.

205+
Export Batches
100%
Return Rate
3
Markets

Target Markets:

United StatesCanadaEuropean Union

Get Quotation Now

Sample Lead Time: 3-7 days
Production Lead Time: 15-25 days
Request Quote

Product Specifications

Material PP plastic + powder-coated steel
Weight 5.8kg (net)
Height Positions 7 positions
Recline Positions 3 positions
Tray Width 54cm (removable)
Seat Width 28cm
Maximum Load 25kg
Suitable Age 6-36 months

Key Features

  • 7-position height adjustment
  • 3-position recline (eating, resting, playing)
  • Removable dishwasher-safe tray
  • 5-point safety harness
  • Anti-slip feet pads
  • Compact fold for storage
  • CPC/ASTM F404 certified
  • JPMA certified available

OEM/ODM Customization Options

Logo Printing: Available on tray, frame
Color Options: 12+ colors
Packaging: Color box or mail box
MOQ for Custom Color: 100 units
Sample Customization: Available
Learn more about OEM/ODM services

Certifications & Testing

CPC
ASTM F404
FDA
EN 14988

Test Report Number: BGP-TR-2026-HC001

Application Scenarios

Feeding time
Play time
Family dining
